titles.title: On the Wings of a Dove

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When troubles surround us When evils come The body grows weak (body grows weak) The spirit grows numb (spirit grows numb) When these things beset us, He doesn't forget us He sends down His love (sends down His love) On the wings of a dove (wings of a dove)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On the wings of a snow-white dove He sends His pure sweet love A sign from above (sign from above) On the wings of a dove (wings of a dove)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When Jesus went down, To the water that lay He was baptized, in an unusual way When it was done, God blessed His son He sent down His Love on the wings of the dove

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: On the wings of a snow-white dove (4x)
